Localization.Description: Login or logout to the system via agent

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} logged out from the system {object.name} on host {event_src.host} via an agent
The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} logged in to the system {object.name} on host {event_src.host} via an agent
